pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support Java 21 language features or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer compiler plugins; 'release' is the standard for cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.
